column2: cat("Total artículos:      ", dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM papers")[[1]], "\n")
cat("Con abstract:         ", dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM papers WHERE abstract IS NOT NULL")[[1]], "\n")
cat("Con visualizaciones:  ", dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM papers WHERE views IS NOT NULL")[[1]], "\n")
cat("Con citas:            ", dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM papers WHERE citations IS NOT NULL")[[1]], "\n")
cat("Con referencias:      ", dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM papers WHERE n_references IS NOT NULL")[[1]], "\n")
